channel.title: Projects on Kenzie
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Kenzie

item.title: Buddy Challenge Feature Design
item.description: A student UX/UI case study for Buddy exploring a challenge-based feature to improve long-term budgeting engagement after onboarding.
